title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Salesforce India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Salesforce India, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Backend Developer for our Jodhpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Salesforce India:
Salesforce India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AWS
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Kubernetes
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Node.js
• Proficiency in MongoDB
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Life and accident insurance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Salesforce India!
